hero.subtitle: One of Mumbai's most revered Hindu temples. Experience wealth, good fortune, and prosperity with the blessings of Goddess Mahalakshmi.

aarti.title: Aarti Schedule
aarti.subtitle: Join us in the divine Aarti ceremonies and receive the Goddess's blessings.

welcome.main_title: Welcome to the Abode of Goddess Mahalakshmi
welcome.main_subtitle: A sacred pilgrimage site in the heart of Mumbai
welcome.section_title: Temple of Divine Grace and Rich Spiritual Tradition
welcome.desc: Shri Mahalakshmi Temple is majestically situated on Bhulabhai Desai Road in Mahalakshmi, Mumbai. This revered temple is dedicated to Goddess Mahalakshmi, who resides as the main deity along with Goddess Mahakali and Goddess Mahasaraswati.

features.heritage_desc: A pillar of Mumbai's spiritual life since 1831.
features.devotion_desc: Prosperity in life with the blessings of Goddess Mahalakshmi.
features.trust_desc: Working for the convenience of devotees and charitable work.

donation.title: Online Donation / Dan
donation.subtitle: Your contribution supports our spiritual & social initiatives.
donation.name: Full Name
donation.receipt_desc: Your divine contribution has been recorded.

instructions.title: Important Instructions
instructions.point1: There will be no refunds once the amount is credited to Temple Trust account.
instructions.point2: For Failed Transactions Devotees Should raise complaints from the payment originating bank.
instructions.point3: All Rights reserved to Temple Trust.
instructions.point4: For 80 G certificate PAN number is mandatory.
instructions.point5: Temple is not responsible for any incorrect information and any failure transactions.

footer.desc: Dedicated to preserving our rich spiritual heritage and supporting the welfare of society. Our work is based on the trio of transparency, technology, and devotion.
footer.80g_desc: All donations are eligible for income tax exemption.

contact.subtitle: If you have any difficulty or questions, you can contact us based on the information below. We are ready to serve you.
contact.feedback_desc: You can reach out to us with your valuable feedback or suggestions. This will help us improve our service to devotees.
contact.other_info_desc: For more information regarding various religious rituals, pooja bookings and online donations, please contact our office.

login.title: Trust Admin
login.subtitle: Secure Access Gateway
login.disclaimer: Unauthorized access is strictly prohibited. Login attempts and IP addresses are recorded.

impact.quote: “Every donation given with faith is a strong foundation for the preservation of our culture.”
